name: flock-os
description: Flock OS — node dependencies for the scaled socketio realtime tier (cross-worker fan-out via @socket.io/redis-adapter, FLO-121). The Python app lives under flock_os/; the realtime node tier lives under realtime/. `npm install` here populates node_modules/ so the realtime modules resolve their deps from the flock_os app root (the repo root, symlinked into bench/apps/flock_os).
